# CODEOWNERS template

Rename this file to `.github/CODEOWNERS` after replacing handles.

```txt
# Default owners
* @TODO_OWNER

# Community and governance files
/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md @TODO_OWNER
/CONTRIBUTING.md @TODO_OWNER
/GOVERNANCE.md @TODO_OWNER
/SECURITY.md @TODO_OWNER
/MODERATION_POLICY.md @TODO_OWNER

# GitHub templates
/.github/ @TODO_OWNER

# Articles
/content/articles/ @TODO_EDITORIAL_MAINTAINER

# Source code
/src/ @TODO_TECH_MAINTAINER
/package.json @TODO_TECH_MAINTAINER
```
